title: Define repository boundary errors
scenario: Repository failures are infrastructure boundary failures. Keep them distinct from domain rule failures.
instructions: Keep CreateOrderError in place. Define RepositoryError with Unavailable and Conflict variants and implement Display for RepositoryError.

hints.body: The starter already has CreateOrderError. Add RepositoryError below it with Unavailable and Conflict variants.
Implement std::fmt::Display for RepositoryError with messages "repository unavailable" and "repository conflict".
One complete solution for Define repository boundary errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: RepositoryError now models infrastructure failures separately from CreateOrderError and provides stable boundary messages through Display.
